shopkeepers.title: Shopkeepers
shopkeepers.subtitle: Create, view, and manage shopkeeper accounts.
shopkeepers.empty: No shopkeepers yet. Create your first one.
shopkeepers.newSubtitle: Account is created with the phone number as the initial password. The shopkeeper is asked to change it on first login.

products.title: Products
products.subtitle: Manage the catalog of shoes, clothing, and other items shopkeepers can order.
products.empty: No products yet. Add your first one.
products.newSubtitle: Create the product. Add variants (colours) and set types (size combinations) on the next page.
products.editSubtitle: Update product details, variants, and set types.

form.name: Product name
form.suggestedRetailHint: Suggestion shown to shopkeepers in their POS. They can override.

variants.title: Variants
variants.subtitle: Different colours or styles of this product.
variants.empty: No variants yet. Add the first colour or style after creating the product.
variants.setsCount: {count, plural, =0 {no sets} one {# set} other {# sets}}

setTypes.title: Set types
setTypes.subtitle: Each set type defines a fixed size combination sold as one unit.
setTypes.comingSoon: Add / edit set types — coming next.

landing.heroTitle: Wholesale ordering and a free POS, built for Nepal.
landing.heroSubtitle: Order shoes and clothing in sets, track every sale, and grow with your shop on a single platform.
landing.featureOrderBody: Browse the catalog, place orders, and track delivery from your phone.
landing.featurePosBody: Sell single pairs to your customers with built-in payments and receipts.
landing.featureLeaderboardBody: Compete with other shopkeepers and earn rewards every month.
